title: blob: Blob/lookup reverse lookup (Blob2 capability)
description:
Implement Blob/lookup in blob.rs (JMAP-BLOBEXT / blob2 capability):
- Detect urn:ietf:params:jmap:blob2 in session capabilities
- Blob/lookup request: accountId, ids [blobId], typeNames ['Message']
- Response: list of objects {id, matchedIds: {Message: [messageId, ...]}}
- Use case: 'find all messages containing this attachment'
- Fixture test: mock blob2 /lookup response, assert returned message IDs match

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/blob_lookup.json
close_reason: Implementation and tests already present from prior work
